headline: Verizon to Power Unforgettable Fan Experiences at the FIFA World Cup 2026™
summary: FIFA to utilize Verizon's 5G, Fixed Wireless Access, and Broadcast Solutions to promote soccer innovation and immersive experiences at the world’s biggest sporting eventNEW YORK, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As the host countries prepare for the FIFA World Cup 2026™, Verizon has been instrumental in designing and delivering the connected experience that will power the world’s most anticipated soccer tournament. headline: GetWhys Raises $5.2M Round to Close the Research-to-Outcome Gap for B2B GTM Teams
summary: GetWhys today announced $5.2M in an oversubscribed funding round to accelerate the growth of its Insight-Driven GTM Platform, which converts buyer insights into the GTM work that drives revenue. The round was led by EPIC Ventures, with participation from CEAS Investments, the Portland Seed Fund, and existing investors Next Frontier Capital, Tuesday Capital, and Capital Eleven. This round brings GetWhys' total funding to $8.5M, and will be used to accelerate go-to-market, product development, and
